burden_views.label: Cumulative reported HIV cases
burden_views.note: Historical cumulative burden extracted from epidemic trend sections and surveillance bulletins.

burden_views.label: PLHIV on ART
burden_views.note: Treatment program response from monthly and quarterly HIV/STI reports.

burden_views.label: Reported deaths
burden_views.note: Deaths among reported HIV cases extracted from surveillance bulletins.

transmission_views.label: Sexual contact share of reported cases
transmission_views.note: Share of diagnosed cases attributed to sexual contact in historical and recent reports.

transmission_views.label: Mother-to-child transmission
transmission_views.note: Historical and recent counts of mother-to-child transmission extracted from surveillance text.

transmission_views.label: Needle transmission
transmission_views.note: Transmission through infected needle sharing where the bulletin reports explicit counts.

highlights.title: 95-95-95 status
highlights.detail: Latest national cascade readout: first 95 61.0%, second 95 66.0%, third 95 57.0%.

highlights.title: Longest historical series
highlights.detail: Reported deaths currently spans 2015-01 to 2022-05 across 36 extracted points.

highlights.title: Transmission trend coverage
highlights.detail: Sexual contact share of reported cases has the deepest structured history in the transmission layer with 51 points.

highlights.title: Diagnosis coverage by region
highlights.detail: BARMM leads at 75.0%, while 3 trails in 2025 Q4.

highlights.title: Largest remaining structuring family
highlights.detail: non chart context accounts for 1357 backlog items.

relationship_highlights.title: Diagnosis coverage by region
relationship_highlights.detail: BARMM leads at 75.0%, while 3 trails at 53.0% in 2025 Q4.

relationship_highlights.title: Treatment coverage by region
relationship_highlights.detail: 6 leads at 79.0%, while 11 trails at 51.0% in 2025 Q4.

relationship_highlights.title: Diagnosis vs treatment coverage
relationship_highlights.detail: 2025 Q4 shows a moderate negative regional association (Spearman r=-0.50).

relationship_highlights.title: Diagnosis vs treatment coverage outliers
relationship_highlights.detail: 6 sits above the fitted pattern (+5.6), while 11 sits below it (-19.4) in 2025 Q4.
